title: centaurea × ligerina
intro: Centaurea × ligerina, also known as the cornflower, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the aster family and is known for its vibrant blue flowers. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are believed to help soothe digestive issues and reduce stress. The plant has also been associated with various health benefits, such as improving sleep quality, reducing anxiety, and promoting relaxation. Centaurea × ligerina can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies for its calming and soothing effects.
